judgeScores.justification: The organization demonstrates excellent logical grouping by file type with intuitive subcategorization (e.g., code separated by language, photos and screenshots organized by year, documents grouped by department/function). Naming conventions are consistently lowercase and descriptive, while nesting maintains an ideal 2-3 level depth (e.g., spreadsheets/projects/project_alpha/). The MANIFEST clearly documents the structure and rationale. A minor improvement could be separating work-related photos (team offsite, whiteboard) from personal vacation photos within the photos/2024/ directory.
